name: Twilight Specter Rayrage
text: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 Pendulum Monster you control; place that Pendulum Monster in your Pendulum Zone (neither player can activate its Pendulum Effects this turn), and if you do, Special Summon this card. (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card, then target 1 card in your Pendulum Zone; it cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects this turn. You can only use each effect of "Twilight Specter Rayrage" once per turn.
pendulum_text: If a Pendulum Monster(s) you control would be destroyed by an opponent's card effect, you can destroy this card instead of 1 of those Pendulum Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Twilight Specter Rayrage" once per turn.
